title: Tradwife: brânză de la zero (adică de la capră)
style_prefix: 3D Pixar-style animation, Romanian village aesthetic, warm golden cinematic lighting, soft global illumination, cohesive warm film color grade, highly detailed, vertical 9:16 composition
character_prefix: ohwxbunica, a cheerful elderly Romanian grandmother with rosy cheeks and kind eyes, wearing a white embroidered Romanian ie blouse and a red floral headscarf

shots.line: Bună, fetelor! Azi, ca o adevărată 'tradwife', fac brânză. De la zero. Adică de la capră.
shots.image_prompt: standing elegantly in a sunny village yard with one hand raised gracefully like a glamorous homemaker, a fancy floral shawl draped over her shoulders, poised smile, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she raises one hand gracefully and gives a poised glamorous smile to the camera, elegant coherent motion, steady framing

shots.voiceover: Primul pas: găsești capra. Capra nu vrea să fie găsită.
shots.image_prompt: a mischievous white goat trotting away across a grassy village yard, looking back over its shoulder, warm golden light, wide shot
shots.motion_prompt: the goat trots away across the yard and glances back over its shoulder, lively coherent motion, steady camera following
shots.sfx: a goat bleating and hooves trotting on grass

shots.line: Un mic detaliu. O prindem noi.
shots.image_prompt: looking slightly disheveled with her floral shawl askew and a coil of rope in one hand, a determined comic grin, in the village yard, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she pushes her askew shawl back and grips the rope with a determined comic grin, lively but coherent motion, steady framing

shots.voiceover: Lapte proaspăt. Direct de la sursă. Bio, normal.
shots.image_prompt: fresh milk streaming into a metal pail in a rustic barn, warm light, foam forming on top, close-up
shots.motion_prompt: milk streams into the metal pail and foam forms on the surface, steady rhythm, appetizing coherent motion, shallow focus
shots.sfx: milk squirting rhythmically into a metal pail

shots.line: Acum fierbem laptele. Tradwife-ele din America n-au capră. Eu am.
shots.image_prompt: stirring a large pot on a wood stove with a wooden spoon, her floral shawl back in place, proud expression, rustic village kitchen, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she stirs the large pot with a wooden spoon and nods proudly at the camera, warm coherent motion, steady framing

shots.image_prompt: extreme close-up of soft fresh white cheese curds being lifted from cloudy whey with a wooden spoon, steam rising, warm light
shots.motion_prompt: soft white curds lift slowly from the whey on the wooden spoon, whey dripping back, gentle steam, slow appetizing coherent motion, shallow focus

sfx.prompt: liquid gently dripping and a spoon stirring in a warm pot

shots.line: Brânză! De la zero. Mi-a luat o zi întreagă și o capră.
shots.image_prompt: proudly presenting a small round of fresh white cheese on a wooden board with both hands, her floral shawl slightly crooked, triumphant grin, rustic village kitchen, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she presents the round of cheese with both hands and beams triumphantly, warm coherent motion, steady framing

shots.line: Dați like dacă și voi faceți totul de la zero. Și feriți-vă de capre. Pupici!
shots.image_prompt: waving goodbye with the wooden board of fresh cheese in front of her, warm grin, rustic village kitchen, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she waves goodbye and blows a kiss to the camera, warm smile, gentle coherent natural motion
